title: Real Estate Sisters
overview: Two broke but sassy real estate agent sisters, aspire to move from selling run-down apartments in shoddy parts of Pretoria to selling high-end suburban homes in Waterkloof Ridge. When they’re finally approached to sell an exclusive mansion, things start looking up, but when they stumble upon a dead body and a drug syndicate, they must keep their wits about them while trying to make their biggest sale.
